1<?php

3namespace BookStack\Activity\Notifications;
4
5use BookStack\Activity\ActivityType;
6use BookStack\Activity\Models\Activity;
7use BookStack\Activity\Models\Loggable;
8use BookStack\Activity\Notifications\Handlers\CommentCreationNotificationHandler;
9use BookStack\Activity\Notifications\Handlers\CommentMentionNotificationHandler;
10use BookStack\Activity\Notifications\Handlers\NotificationHandler;
11use BookStack\Activity\Notifications\Handlers\PageCreationNotificationHandler;
12use BookStack\Activity\Notifications\Handlers\PageUpdateNotificationHandler;
13use BookStack\Users\Models\User;
14
15class NotificationManager
16{
17    /**
18     * @var array<string, class-string<NotificationHandler>[]>
19     */
20    protected array $handlersByActivity = [];
21
22    public function handle(Activity $activity, string|Loggable $detail, User $user): void
23    {
24        $activityType = $activity->type;
25        $handlersToRun = $this->handlersByActivity[$activityType] ?? [];
26        foreach ($handlersToRun as $handlerClass) {
27            /** @var NotificationHandler $handler */
28            $handler = new $handlerClass();
29            $handler->handle($activity, $detail, $user);
30        }
31    }
32
33    /**
34     * @param class-string<NotificationHandler> $handlerClass
35     */
36    public function registerHandler(string $activityType, string $handlerClass): void
37    {
38        if (!isset($this->handlersByActivity[$activityType])) {
39            $this->handlersByActivity[$activityType] = [];
40        }
41
42        if (!in_array($handlerClass, $this->handlersByActivity[$activityType])) {
43            $this->handlersByActivity[$activityType][] = $handlerClass;
44        }
45    }
46
47    public function loadDefaultHandlers(): void
48    {
49        $this->registerHandler(ActivityType::PAGE_CREATE, PageCreationNotificationHandler::class);
50        $this->registerHandler(ActivityType::PAGE_UPDATE, PageUpdateNotificationHandler::class);
51        $this->registerHandler(ActivityType::COMMENT_CREATE, CommentCreationNotificationHandler::class);
52        $this->registerHandler(ActivityType::COMMENT_CREATE, CommentMentionNotificationHandler::class);
53        $this->registerHandler(ActivityType::COMMENT_UPDATE, CommentMentionNotificationHandler::class);
54    }
55}
